The '''Fett homestead''' was the home of the [[Clan Fett|Fett family]] on [[Concord Dawn/Legends|Concord Dawn]] and the childhood home of [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. In [[58 BBY/Legends|58 BBY]], the [[Mandalorian Civil War (True Mandalorians)|Mandalorian Civil War]] spilled on to the property. Jango's father, the [[Journeyman Protector/Legends|Journeyman Protector]] of [[Concord Dawn/Legends|Concord Dawn]], hid [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Jaster Mereel]] from the wrath of [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]] leader [[Tor Vizsla|Vizsla]].

In retaliation, Vizsla [[Death/Legends|killed]] both adult Fetts and destroyed the [[Farm/Legends|farm]]. Jango escaped, while the Death Watch took [[Arla Fett|Arla]] as a captive.
